About

The Strategist
Behind the Screen

I'm a Las Vegas-based digital marketing professional with 14+ years of experience building brand presence, growing audiences, and translating content into real business results. My background spans professional sports, labor advocacy, and multi-client agency work.

From managing social media for a Triple-A baseball organization to running high-stakes public campaigns for Teamsters Local 14, I bring strategic thinking, hands-on execution, and a creator's eye to every brand I work with.

I own Whittaker Media Group, a digital marketing agency where I serve as the technical and AI specialist — handling everything from campaign strategy and content production to analytics reporting and paid social.

Experience

Where I've
Done the Work

2025 — Present
Whittaker Media Group
Owner & Digital Marketing Strategist
  • Lead full-service digital marketing agency — social strategy, content production, paid media, and campaign execution for client brands.
  • Contracted with Teamsters Local 14 as Communications & Social Media Specialist, managing digital platforms and the high-visibility "Heroes Shouldn't Struggle" EMS campaign.
  • Produce complete campaign creative — photo, video, copy, and design — across Canva and CapCut; manage content lifecycle from brief to publish to analysis.
  • Deliver analytics reporting on campaign performance, audience growth, and engagement trends to inform ongoing strategy.
2024 — 2026
Las Vegas Aviators (Triple-A / Oakland A's)
Digital Marketing Manager
  • Owned full social media strategy across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X, and YouTube — driving 50.6M impressions and 1M+ engagements in a single season.
  • Developed and maintained a season-long content calendar coordinating 100+ promotional nights, sponsorships, and brand campaigns.
  • Directed on-location content shoots — player features, fan interviews, game-day video, and lifestyle content produced entirely in-house.
  • Executed paid social campaigns (Meta Ads) supporting ticket sales and promotions; contributed to 30% YoY e-commerce growth.
  • Managed community across all platforms — timely response to comments, messages, and reputation monitoring.
2014 — 2023
Las Vegas Aviators (Triple-A)
Marketing Operations Associate
  • Supported marketing operations including promotional giveaway execution, fan engagement, and in-stadium activations across a full minor league season schedule.
  • Served as a primary fan-facing contact during promotional events — managing crowd interaction and on-site brand experience.
  • Built foundational knowledge of brand marketing, digital platforms, and sports entertainment operations that led to a digital marketing leadership role.
